world.title: One Man Lightly Wounded After Dozens of Hezbollah Missiles Target Northern Israel
world.summary: One man was lightly wounded as Hezbollah launched dozens of missiles targeting northern Israel. Concurrently, Lebanese media reported two fatalities from drone strikes on the Tyre-Beirut highway, where one vehicle was hit while traveling south, and another was struck approximately 3.5 kilometers away. Meanwhile, no progress was made in Gaza cease-fire talks as Hamas met with Egyptian intelligence in Cairo.

world.title: Trump criticises Giorgia Melonis Iran war stance, straining US-Italy alliance
world.summary: US President Donald Trump criticized Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni for her stance on the Iran war, expressing shock that she did not align with Washington's position. He also took issue with her defense of Pope Leo, stating that she was "no longer the same person." This marks a significant strain in the previously close US-Italy alliance.

world.title: Why Dubai’s Most Famous Hotel Is Shutting Doors Until 2027
world.summary: Dubai's iconic Burj Al Arab hotel will close for an 18-month restoration, marking the end of its 25-year operation as a luxury landmark. The hotel, known for its distinctive sail-shaped design, has been a symbol of opulence in the city. The renovation aims to enhance its facilities and maintain its status as a premier destination in Dubai.

business.title: Snap layoffs: Company may cut up to 1 in 5 jobs; Perplexity integration called off
business.summary: Snap Inc. is planning significant layoffs, potentially affecting 15-20% of its workforce, according to Alex Heath. While some teams will see major reductions, the Specs unit, which develops AR smart glasses, is increasing hiring. Additionally, a planned $400 million integration with Perplexity AI has been canceled due to disagreements between the two companies.

business.title: Massive Fire Breaks Out At BYD Factory In China's Shenzhen: Video
business.summary: A massive fire erupted at BYD's factory in Shenzhen, specifically within a multi-level parking garage. Videos shared on social media depict thick clouds of black smoke rising from the facility. The incident has prompted a large-scale emergency response. Authorities are currently addressing the situation, but details regarding the cause of the fire and any potential injuries remain unclear.

business.title: Mahindra Scorpio Classic Prices Increased With Immediate Effect
business.summary: Mahindra has increased the prices of the Scorpio Classic in India, with the new starting price set at Rs. 13 lakh. This revision applies to all variants of the vehicle. The updated price list follows the company's announcement of a planned price hike effective April 6, 2026. Details on the specific percentage increase were not disclosed.

technology.title: Why Apple threatened to remove Musk's Grok from App Store
technology.summary: Apple threatened to remove the Grok AI app from its App Store due to violations of store guidelines regarding user-generated sexualized deepfakes involving women and children. The issue was reported by NBC News, highlighting concerns over inappropriate content. Apple’s action underscores its commitment to maintaining a safe environment for users and adhering to its policies on harmful material.

technology.title: Apple warned Musk's xAI of removing Grok from App Store over AI deepfakes
technology.summary: Apple has warned Musk's xAI that its Grok app may be removed from the App Store due to violations of guidelines concerning sexualized deepfakes. The company has requested fixes to address these issues, emphasizing that failure to comply could result in the app's removal. The situation highlights ongoing concerns regarding content moderation and AI-generated material in mobile applications.

technology.title: Xiaomi Redmi A7 Pro 5g: Chinese smartphone maker returns with budget phone; priced at Rs 11499 with 6300 mAh battery
technology.summary: Xiaomi has launched the Redmi A7 Pro 5G, a budget smartphone priced at Rs 11,499. The device features a substantial 6,300 mAh battery and upgraded display. The company aims to attract customers with this new offering, highlighting significant improvements over previous models. Further details on specifications and features are expected to be discussed in upcoming articles.

sports.title: Arne Slot's time is up at Anfield after shocking selections, Ousmane Dembele's Ballon d'Or-winning brilliance and all of the winners and losers from Liverpool's Champions League loss to Paris Saint-Ge
sports.summary: Liverpool faced a disappointing Champions League exit after losing to Paris Saint-Germain at Anfield. Key figures included Arne Slot, whose selections were criticized, and Ousmane Dembele, whose exceptional goal highlighted his Ballon d'Or-winning talent. The match showcased various winners and losers, including players like Hugo Ekitike, as Liverpool's hopes for advancement were dashed in the last 16.

sports.title: “It looks really bad”: Liverpool striker Hugo Ekitike suffered a horror injury against PSG-now his World Cup hopes are in doubt
sports.summary: Hugo Ekitike sustained a serious injury during Liverpool FC's Champions League match against Paris Saint-Germain. Manager Arne Slot described the injury as "really bad," but did not provide details on its severity. Further tests are planned for Wednesday. The injury raises concerns about Ekitike's availability for the upcoming World Cup, adding to Liverpool's challenges this season.

health.title: COVID ‘Cicada’ Variant: What One Should Know
health.summary: A new COVID-19 subvariant, named “Cicada” (BA.3.2), is circulating, prompting concerns among families. Health experts advise a fact-based response, noting it is classified as a “variant under monitoring” with low risk. Current vaccines still provide strong protection against severe illness. Experts emphasize the importance of vaccination and hygiene, urging preparedness over panic in response to evolving variants.

health.title: 6 symptoms of chronic stress your body is battling silently: Belly fat, craving for salt, waking at 3 am, more
health.summary: Chronic stress can manifest through various physical symptoms that often go unnoticed. Common indicators include increased belly fat, salt cravings, and waking up at 3 AM. Experts emphasize the importance of recognizing these signs as they may signify deeper imbalances in the body. Timely awareness and seeking professional guidance are crucial for managing chronic stress effectively.

health.title: Want a healthy snack? Nutritionist shares a protein-fibre combination that supports blood sugar balance and gut health
health.summary: Nutritionist Deepsikha emphasizes the importance of healthy snacking, advocating for balanced, nutrient-rich options. She highlights a protein-fiber combination that can help regulate blood sugar levels and promote gut health. Many individuals tend to choose ultra-processed snacks like chips and sugary cereals, which may satisfy cravings but lack essential nutrients. Healthier alternatives can support overall well-being.

science.title: Rare comet visible from south India: How to watch
science.summary: A newly discovered comet, C/2025 R3 (Pan-STARRS), is visible in south India until April 20, appearing low on the eastern horizon just before sunrise. This rare celestial event allows observers to witness the comet, which was discovered on September 8, 2025. Skywatchers are encouraged to look for the comet during the pre-dawn hours for optimal viewing.

science.title: New study suggests Neanderthals may have eaten outsiders, not their own group
science.summary: A new study of 41,000–45,000-year-old Neanderthal remains indicates potential cannibalism, suggesting that victims were likely from outside their communities rather than their own groups. Analysis of bone marks reveals evidence of consumption, specifically targeting women and children. This research challenges previous assumptions about Neanderthal behavior and social dynamics, highlighting their interactions with neighboring groups.

science.title: Deep Dive into the Different Types of Underwater Algae
science.summary: The article examines various types of underwater algae, highlighting their ecological significance. It discusses blue-green algae, which are technically bacteria but are often classified with algae due to their photosynthetic capabilities. Additionally, it covers brown algae, predominantly found in colder oceans, which includes large seaweeds. The diversity of these organisms plays a crucial role in aquatic ecosystems.

entertainment.title: What to watch on Netflix, Prime Video, JioHotstar
entertainment.summary: This week’s OTT releases include "Do Deewaane Seher Mein" on Netflix, featuring Siddhant Chaturvedi and Mrunal Thakur in a romantic drama about a modern love story with emotional highs and relatable moments. Other platforms like Prime Video and JioHotstar also have new content, including various films and series, catering to diverse viewer preferences.

entertainment.title: A driver never forgot actor Madhavan's son Vedaant. Actor shares his parenting tip that is taught even in MBA schools
entertainment.summary: Actor R Madhavan recounted a story about his son Vedaant, whose politeness left a lasting impression on a driver years later. Madhavan emphasized the importance of treating everyone with respect, noting that such courtesy is a vital soft skill in professional development. He highlighted how these simple acts can shape relationships and create opportunities throughout life.

entertainment.title: From Feel-Good Films to Fear: MS Raju’s Agadha Announced, First Look Stuns Fans
entertainment.summary: Veteran filmmaker MS Raju, known for his feel-good films, is venturing into the horror genre with his upcoming movie titled Agadha. This project aims to be a pan-Indian spectacle, showcasing a significant shift in Raju's directorial style. The first look of Agadha has generated excitement among fans, highlighting the filmmaker's new direction in storytelling.
